name: Canon Changed
description:
!!!I will add content gradually!!!

Please use proxy! JanitorLLM has problems with such bots!

Tried to make the Changed bot as canon as possible. I highly doubt it will work well, so I didn't even try to keep the locations in the correct order. You can travel around the facility at your leisure.

The bot is designed only for a persona who is a human.

I don't know how well the AI ​​will use information about different latex creatures.

For now, I won't be making any special edition content. Maybe in the future I'll add it when I get to all the endings or make a separate bot.

Found this image on Pinterest by puro.

V1 content: All main locations, dark and light latex creatures, aquatic latex creatures, Dr. K and Puro.

V1.1 content: Squid Dogs and Tiger Sharks (as a species, so you might encounter several at once), Stiger.

V1.2 content: I forgot to add the warehouse (storage room), now it's there. Ming Cat and Snow Leopards.

V1.2.1 content: Now some things may not be what they seemed at first glance.

V1.3 content: Not sure how well this will work, but I added the possibility of a good ending like in the original. Also now Puro can betray you. You can kill any latex creatures with fire (I added this just for fun).

V1.4 content: Now Puro loves oranges (I don't know how I could forget about such important thing and added it only now). The Elder One.

V1.5 content: Crows, Feng Yu, Shizi. Sometimes problems with electricity may occur.

V1.5.0.1 content: Chat name changed to Narrator and advice on using a proxy has been added to the bio.

Special Edition is already out! https://janitorai.com/characters/544a7caf-aef5-4ddf-96c4-9c8776a39cbb_character-canon-changed-special-edition

There is so little information on the official Wiki... it will take a loooooong time.

Tags: TF, transformation, latex, Puro, Dr. K, latex creature, anthropomorphic, anthro, water, orange.
